title: Summit County Painting Contractor | House Painter Summit County, UT
description: Professional house painters and painting contractor in Summit County, UT. Interior painting, exterior painting, cabinet refinishing & more. Free estimates. Call 435-649-0158.
body:
RL Peek Painting has been the trusted painting contractor in Summit County since 1987. We provide interior and exterior painting, staining, drywall repair, and cabinet refinishing for homes and businesses across Park City, Deer Valley, Kamas, Oakley, and all of Summit County.

Summit County's alpine climate creates conditions that few painting contractors outside the area truly understand. At 6,000 to 8,000 feet, UV exposure is significantly more intense than at lower elevations, which bleaches pigment and degrades paint binders faster. Freeze-thaw cycles through spring attack caulk joints and siding seams. Heavy snowfall and windblown moisture test every exterior surface. We've worked in these conditions for decades and specifically select paints with UV inhibitors, flexible formulations, and strong moisture resistance so your finish holds up through the seasons.

Exterior projects are scheduled from mid-April through early fall when temperatures and humidity are in the right range for proper adhesion and curing. Interior work is available year-round. We provide clear scheduling and communication from the initial estimate through the final walkthrough so you always know where your project stands.

We offer the full range of painting and finishing services for Summit County homeowners:
  Interior and exterior painting
  Interior and exterior wood staining
  Drywall and sheetrock repair
  Cabinet and wood refinishing
  Interior plastering, including Venetian plaster
  Lime and mineral washing
  Polyaspartic garage floor coatings

From historic Old Town cottages to large mountain modern estates and resort condominiums, we've worked across all of Summit County's neighborhoods and housing types. We understand the access logistics, the architectural styles, and the finish quality that Summit County homeowners expect.

Request a free estimate for painting in Summit County. We'll schedule an in-home visit, walk the property with you, and provide a written estimate before we leave — usually the same day.

faq.question: Why choose a local painting contractor in Summit County?
faq.answer: A local Summit County painting contractor knows our climate — high UV, freeze-thaw cycles, and heavy snow — and selects paints and methods that hold up. We're also nearby for estimates, follow-up visits, and any warranty care needed, and we're invested in the community we serve.

faq.question: What painting services do you offer in Summit County?
faq.answer: In Summit County we offer interior and exterior painting, interior and exterior staining, drywall repair, cabinet and wood refinishing, interior plastering, lime and mineral washing, and polyaspartic garage floors. Every project includes thorough prep, quality materials, and a clean finish.

faq.question: When is the best time for exterior painting in Summit County?
faq.answer: In Summit County, the ideal exterior painting window runs from mid-April through early fall — typically mid-September at the latest. Temperatures need to be above 50°F and stable for proper adhesion. We monitor conditions and schedule exterior work accordingly.

faq.answer: Call 435-649-0158 or submit our contact form. We'll schedule an in-home visit, walk the property with you, and provide a written estimate before we leave — usually the same day.
